supported_here: The claimed 2D hard-max retrieval path matches the transparent reference latest-relevant-state lookup exactly on the fixed bounded R55 suite.
R55 keeps maximizer-row identity explicit rather than collapsing the gate to value parity only.
R55 makes duplicate-max and tie semantics first-class, machine-readable gate criteria.
unsupported_here: R55 does not establish trace-VM semantics or fast-path system value by itself.
R55 does not authorize transformed-model entry, trainable entry, arbitrary C, or broad Wasm claims.
R55 does not permit R56 to open if exact retrieval equivalence fails.
disconfirmed_here: The idea that retrieval equivalence can be inferred from end-to-end demo success without exact maximizer-row parity.
